characters.name: Acchi
characters.description: Kirby: Squeak SquadartworkAcchiName(JA)アッチー (Atchī)In GamesCopy AbilityFireCategoryLarge EnemyAcchiis alarge enemythat appears inKirby: Squeak Squad. It resembles a red salamander that sneezes fireballs at Kirby when he approaches. Acchi yields theFireabilitywhenSuper Inhaled. Acchi is a red salamander or dragon-like creature greater in length than height. It has brown eyes, a tan underbelly, a small mouth, stubby arms, and two-toed feet. Flaps of skin resembling fangs hang on either side of its mouth. Acchi's back is constantly ablaze. Acchi is a stationary enemy that will sit in one spot, waiting forKirbyto approach. The enemy attacks by sneezing fireballs, which move in a arc. These burn on the ground for a few seconds before going out. Acchi can spit them upwards in a parabola or straight at Kirby.

characters.name: Ace Phanta
characters.description: Kirby: Triple DeluxescreenshotAce PhantaName(JA)エースフワローバ (Ēsu Fuwarōba)- MeaningAce Foorlowberエース = Ace, フワローバ = FoorlowberIn GamesCopy AbilityNoneCategoryLarge enemy Ace Phantais alarge enemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby: Triple Deluxe. Due to their appearances being limited toHypernovaareas, these enemies yield noCopy Abilityupon beinginhaled. Ace Phanta is a larger relative ofPhanta. It is a big periwinkle ghost with wing-like arms. It wears a blue witch's hat and has a raspberry-colored skull mask for a face. Its entire face hinges upward to reveal a gaping mouth. Ace Phanta has yellow eyes.

characters.name: Ace Phanta
characters.description: Kirby: Triple DeluxescreenshotAce PhantaName(JA)エースフワローバ (Ēsu Fuwarōba)- MeaningAce Foorlowberエース = Ace, フワローバ = FoorlowberIn GamesCopy AbilityNoneCategoryLarge enemy Ace Phantais alarge enemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby: Triple Deluxe. Ace Phanta has yellow eyes.

characters.name: Acore
characters.description: CharactersAcoreFull nameAcore the Great TreeName(JP)アコル (Akoru)- MeaningAcoreFirst AppearanceWar of the WoodsSpeciesOak treeAffiliationWhispy Woods,Rick,Coo,Kitsuu,Nruff,Nelly,Pon & ConEnglish VoiceUnknownJapanese VoiceNobuo Tobita Acoreis the oldest tree inWhispy Woods Forest, and is around 800 years old. He is a close friend toWhispy Woodsand has earned his respect and gratitude by housing many little woodland creatures in his roots and branches. The animals includeRick,Coo,Nruff, among many others. The animals he lends his body to have protected him for the many years that he has been alive. During a big storm, all of the animals (with the help ofTiffandTuff) help anchor Acore down to the ground and stop him from being uprooted. Thanks to the efforts of them all, Acore survives the storm. Acore reveals that he was sound asleep during the whole thing, but still thanks them all for saving him. His name is likely derived from "acorn", a type of seed that falls from oak trees.

characters.name: Acro
characters.description: Kirby 64: The Crystal ShardsartworkAcroName(JA)アクロ (Akuro)- MeaningAcroIn GamesCopy AbilityCutter(fromFishbone),Bomb(fromPedoandBlowfish)CategoryBossEnemy Info cardnumber# 4 Acrois abossin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby's Dream Land 3. He is a large orca whale that apparently lives in a deep sea trench onAqua Star. He is not evil, however, as his appearances show him to be under the influence ofDark Matter. Acro is a large Killer Whale. The top half of his body is a light gray color(navy blue in some artworks), while his underbelly is white. He has two shiny blue eyes. He has a dorsal fin on his back alongside with having two flippers. Much like his real life counterpart, he has white markings near his eyes and on a white spot on his dorsal area. He also has a small light gray spot seen on his nose. Acro also has a row of tiny sharp teeth seen whenever he opens his mouth. Unlike his real life counterpart, Acro does not have a visible blowhole on his head.

characters.name: Acro Jr.
characters.description: Kirby's Dream Land 3spriteAcro Jr.Name(JA)チビシャチ (Chibi Shachi)- MeaningLittle OrcaIn GamesCopy AbilityNoneCategoryRegular enemy Acro Jr.is anenemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby's Dream Land 3. It doesn’t give aCopy Abilitywhen inhaled byKineduring the fightunderwater. Acro Jr. is a smaller juvenile version ofAcro. The top of its body is gray and it has white underbelly alongside markings around its eyes and back. It has beady black eyes. It also has a tiny dorsal fin on its back and two flippers.

characters.name: Adeleine
characters.description: CharactersKirby Star AlliesartworkAdeleineName(JA)アドレーヌ (Adorēnu)- MeaningAdeleineGenderFemaleIn gamesSpeciesHumanAffiliationKirby,Ribbon,Waddle Dee,King Dedede Adeleineis a character in theKirbyseries, making her official debut inKirby 64: The Crystal Shards. She came toPlanet Popstarto study art. Adeleine is a talented young artist that can paint pictures that come to life. There is ambiguity surrounding the idea that Adeleine andAdo, abossinKirby's Dream Land 3, are the same individual; due to the similarities, both "Ado" and "Adeleine" are covered here; this should not serve as a confirmation that Ado and Adeleine correspond to the same character (at least, in all instances). Despite her lack of dialogue in theKirbyseries, it is known that Adeleine is very artistic and creative. She is almost always seen with her art equipment, with which she can quickly create various works of art. Like Kirby, she appears to be a cheerful and kind soul, and is noticeably happy most of the time. InKirby 64: The Crystal Shards, she eagerly joins Kirby and the gang after being freed from Dark Matter's control. In some parts of the game, and in cutscenes, she renders assistance to Kirby and the others by painting food or hints. According to theKirby Star Allies Channelon Update 11, Adeleine is a little shy about being fed food, hiding her face with her hands. Outside of the Kirby games, Adeleine is often portrayed as a romantic person. Two notable instances of this are in the manga series, "Kirby Manga Mania", and in the storybook series, "It's Kirby Time". In the former, Adeleine longs to find her dream boyfriend, and is distraught that there are no human boys in Dream Land. She eventually paints a human body for Kirby to operate, only to decide that she likes him the way he is. In the end, it is revealed that she was merely playing, leaving Kirby comically heartbroken. In "It's Kirby Time", Adeleine's pursuit of love is taken slightly more seriously when she falls in love with a "special someone". When she discovers a red string, she is excited at the idea that it may lead her to her love, but also nervous at the idea that it might not. Throughout the story, she is interested in seeing the world through her love's eyes, and uses this sentiment to bring herself at peace during her unsteadiness, showing that she has a very empathetic side to her.

characters.name: Air Rider
characters.description: Air RiderName(JA)エアライドマシンライダー (Ea Raido Mashin Raidā)- MeaningAir Ride Machine Riderエアライドマシン =Air Ride Machine, ライダー = RiderFirst appearanceAir-Ride-in-Style - Part ILatest appearanceFright to the FinishCopy AbilityBaton(Formula Rider),Iron(Wing Rider),Top(Shadow Rider),Fire,Bomb(Wing Rider) (Fright to the Finish)Japanese voiceRika Higashino Air Ridersare villains who appear in thetwo-partAir-Ride-In-Styleepisode ofKirby: Right Back at Ya!. Air Riders are small, gray, ninja-esque alien creatures with blue visors, dark blue-purple feet, and white gloves. They are shown to be able to carry batons, flamethrowers and missile launchers, gold maces, and endless supplies of green tops that explode not long after making contact with anything. The Air Riders are also shown to ride on different Air Ride Machines. The machines they have been shown to ride on areFormula Star,Rocket Star,Winged Star, andShadow Star. The white letters painted on their foreheads that are found at the beginning of the names of the Air Ride Machines shows which Air Ride Machines they ride on.

characters.name: Aliens
characters.description: CharactersAliensName(JP)エイリアン (Eirian)- MeaningAliensFirst AppearanceJunk JamJapanese VoiceMizuki Saitoh Thealiensare characters that appeared in theKirby: Right Back at Ya!episodeJunk Jam. A trio of intergalactic garbage beings, these three mistookDream Landfor a dump and started pouring their trash everywhere from within their spaceship. AfterFireKirbydestroyedFire Lion, the aliens, realizing their mistake, cleaned everything up, and then disposed of the trash by dropping it into the atmosphere, where it burned up. Other than their differences in width and size from each other, the aliens share the same physical appearance. They have dark pink skin with even darker pinkish gray hands. They wear green overalls and have neon green eyes and alien-ish mouths on top of their heads. It can also be noted that the aliens are veryCappy-like in appearance.

characters.name: Amon
characters.description: SheepMonsterAmonName(JA)アモン (Amon)- MeaningAmonFirst appearanceSheepwreckedCopy AbilityNeedleEnglish voiceTed LewisJapanese voiceNobuo Tobita Amon(known as "the bad sheep" in English) is a renegade sheepMonsterthat was a part ofMayor Len Blustergas's flock of sheep and appears inKirby: Right Back at Ya!in episode 43,Sheepwrecked. What he did in his attempt to gain his revenge may be referenced inThe Kirby Quizwhen theN.M.E. Sales Guyasks the final question. Due to his traumatic experience of being nearly eaten by King Dedede, Amon eventually developed a subversive-like mindset, believing all sheep were mere fodder for the Cappies to be killed and eaten, and thus feeling the need to turn against them. He is persuasive enough to rally his fellow sheep to rise against the Cappies. After his fellow sheep regain their senses, Amon, while reasonable enough to stop fighting, denounces them as too foolish to be helped and strives to find a flock with a similar mindset to him.

characters.name: Amprey
characters.description: Kirby's Epic YarnscreenshotAmpreyName(JA)ナンギー (Nangī)- MeaningNangyIn GamesCategoryRegular Enemy,Large Enemy Ampreyis alarge enemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby's Epic Yarn. Amprey is a purple eel-like creature. It has green fins and a green tail fin. It has a blue dot design on its body and two yellow button eyes.

characters.name: Anemonee
characters.description: Kirby's Epic YarnscreenshotAnemoneeName(JA)イソキンチャク (Isokinchaku)- MeaningIsokinchakuIn GamesCategoryRegular Enemy Anemoneeis anenemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby's Epic Yarn. Anemonee is purple and white trapezoid-shaped creature. He has a red smiling face and a yellow and pink button eye. Six frilly tentacles protrude from the top of his head. When attacking their targets, Anemonees start to frown, presumably due to the struggle.

characters.name: Angel
characters.description: CharactersKirby's Dream Land 3spriteAngelName(JA)エンジェル (Enjeru)- MeaningAngelGenderFemaleIn gamesSpeciesAngel Angel[1]is a character that appears in the gameKirby's Dream Land 3. She appears inIceberg's sixth level. She wantsKirbyto collect the feathers that make up her wings. He can obtain these by accessing areas blocked by blocks that can only be destroyed with certain abilities. If Kirby obtains all of the feathers, he will earn aHeart Starat the end of the level.

characters.name: Anger Masker
characters.description: MaskedUnmaskedAnger MaskerName(JA)アンガーマスカー (Angā Masukā)- MeaningAnger Maskerアンガー = Anger, マスカー = MaskerIn GamesCopy AbilityNoneCategoryRegular EnemyAnger Maskeris anenemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby Star Allies. Anger Masker has a round orange body, hands, and feet. It wears a handmade headband and skirt made of wood and string. Behind the mask is a face with eyes likeKirby's, a wide tan nose, and yellow face paint. The mask it wears is colored orange, red, white, and leather. The mouth is in a zigzag pattern, the "face paint" is red, and the mask has one "eye". Anger Maskers make their first appearance in the first stage of World 2,Friendly Field. Anger Masker stands on a pile of leaves or walks in a small area. When wearing its mask, it throws handmade hammers at the player. When its mask gets cut or separated into parts, it reacts in a cowardly way, running away from the player and crying.

characters.name: Angie
characters.description: CharactersKirby's Epic YarnartworkAngieName(JA)エンジィ (Enjyi)- MeaningAngieGenderFemaleIn gamesAffiliationKirby, Prince Fluff Angieis a character in theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby's Epic Yarn. Angie is a small, round, yellow creature resembling an angel, with white wings and a single strand of yellow hair. She has green beady eyes and a pair of sunshine yellow legs that she uses to carry Kirby back onto the stage.

characters.name: Anige
characters.description: AnigeName(JA)アニゲー (Anigē)- MeaningAnigeFirst appearanceTooned OutCopy AbilitySparkJapanese voiceNobuo TobitaAnigeis amonsterin theKirbyseries, appearing exclusively as the main antagonist of theKirby: Right Back at Ya!episode, "Tooned Out". Anige's full body Anige is a dusty old robot surrounded by eight sphere-like drones that bear a lone red eye orbiting around his body. His head is an old fashioned television with a dark green screen that bears a lone large purple eye against several static-like lines. The rest of his body resembles a tabletop lamp. He has a long metal rod for a body and a golden base. Anige lacks arms, instead having floating hands. He holds a controller resembling that of a retro video game console which he can link to optical senors for the purpose of controlling his enemies. LikeDis Walney, Anige has a small moustache and a red beret.

characters.name: Animal Friends
characters.description: CharactersKirbyandGooeywith the Animal Friends inKirby's Dream Land 3. Gooey (bottom-left) is not technically a part of this group.Animal FriendsName(JA)なかま (Nakama)- MeaningFriendsIn games WhenKirbyis off to save the day, sometimes he needs a little help getting the job done. To assist him are hisAnimal Friends. Riding on, under, or in them, they allow him to get to place he sometimes cannot reach himself. Each Animal Friend has a different way of usingCopy Abilitiesused by Kirby. For example, when Kirby has theCutterability and his being held byCoo, Coo will shoot razor-sharp feathers out in front of him to attack if the player presses the B button. In order to solve certain puzzles and reach certain areas, some abilities will need to be augmented by using Animal Friends. The Animal Friends were first introduced inKirby's Dream Land 2withRick,Kine, andCoo. Upon defeating amid-boss, a sack containing one of the three animals opens, allowing Kirby to pair up with the pet.Gooeyand his female counterpart appear if Kirby is already teamed up with the Animal Friend that would have been rewarded. Their only purposes are to heal Kirby and grant anextra life, respectively. Female Gooey is very rare and must be seen at least once to earn 100%, adding 1% to the game's completion rate.

characters.name: Antler
characters.description: Kirby: Triple DeluxescreenshotAntlerName(JA)バグズ (Baguzu)- MeaningBugs (Collective name)In GamesCategoryLarge enemyAntlersarelarge enemiesin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby: Triple Deluxe. They're summoned byQueen Sectoniaduring the second and third phases of her battle. Antler comes in four types, each armed with a club and shield. Antlers are very durable enemies who resist knockback until their health is depleted, but they can be defeated in one hit by Queen Sectonia's own attacks. They attackKirbyby using magic and bashing him with their clubs. Kirby: Triple DeluxemodelRed AntlerName(JA)レッドアントラー (Reddo Antorā)- MeaningRed Antlerレッド = Red, アントラー = AntlerIn GamesCopy AbilityFireCategoryLarge enemyRed Antlers are the second largest and second strongest Antlers. Queen Sectonia summons them in pairs during the second phase of her fight, and in a trio during the third phase of her fight. They casts fireballs with their clubs and grant theFireabilitywheninhaled. Kirby: Triple DeluxemodelGreen AntlerName(JA)グリーンアントラー (Gurīn Antorā)- MeaningGreen Antlerグリーン = Green, アントラー = AntlerIn GamesCopy AbilitySparkCategoryLarge enemyGreen Antlers are the third largest and third strongest Antlers. Queen Sectonia summons them in groups of three during the second phase of her fight, and in a group of four during the third phase of her fight. They use their clubs to perform spark attacks and grant theSparkability when inhaled.

characters.name: Apolo
characters.description: Kirby's Dream Land 3artworkApoloName(JA)アポロ (Aporo)- MeaningApoloIn GamesCopy AbilityNone (heals Kirby when eaten, however)CategoryRegular enemyApolois anenemyinKirby's Dream Land 3. Apolos make their first appearance inGrass Land. Apolo is a simple brown cone with a pink upper section. The enemy has two shiny, circular eyes. Some Apolos have an alternate color scheme: a blue lower section and a light blue upper section. This variation of Apolo commonly appears in icy levels. Apolo spins continually around trees or other rounded objects, and can hit the player when it is in the foreground. IfKirbyinhalesApolo, he will recover a bar ofvitality. The enemy is occasionally difficult to inhale due to its positioning; Apolo typically dwells high above the ground.

characters.name: Arena Waddle Dee
characters.description: Kirby Super StarspriteArena Waddle DeeIn GamesCopy AbilityNonePoints Given200CategoryBossSpecial notes250 HPArena Waddle Deerefers to the unnamedWaddle DeebossinThe ArenaofKirby Super Star. He can be defeated by beinginhaledor by hitting him. His role is replaced byBandana Waddle DeeinKirby Super Star Ultra. This Waddle Dee has no attack methods, only walking around the arena slowly, and sometimes jumping. Another Waddle Dee with the same behavior as his makes an appearance only in one of three mid-boss all-stars rounds in theBoss Endurancesub-game ofKirby & The Amazing Mirror, although this one is explicitly named "Waddle Dee" and given a Waddle Dee's more usual colors.

characters.name: Armor Waddle Dee
characters.description: Kirby's Return to Dream LandmodelArmor Waddle DeeName(JA)アーマーワドルディ (Āmā Wadoru Di)- MeaningArmor Waddle Deeアーマー = Armor, ワドル = Waddle, ディ = DeeIn GamesCopy AbilityNoneCategoryLarge enemyKirby's Return to Dream LandmodelArmor Halcandra DeeName(JA)アーマーハルカンドルディ (Āmā Harukandoru Di)- MeaningArmor Halcandle Deeアーマー = Armor, ハルカンドル = Halcandle, ディ = DeeIn GamesCopy AbilityNoneCategoryLarge enemy Armor Waddle Deeis alarge enemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby's Return to Dream Land. Armor Waddle Dee is a group of threeWaddle Deesinside a large, mechanical Waddle Dee. It has a cream-colored face with slightly darker blush marks and two vertical slots for eye holes, a red main body with slots on the right and left sides for the arms, and a brown top equipped with a yellow periscope.

characters.name: Astronomer Waddle Dee
characters.description: CharactersAstronomer Waddle DeeGenderMaleIn gamesSpeciesWaddle DeeAstronomer Waddle Deeis a supporting character that first appeared inKirby and the Forgotten Land – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Star-Crossed World. Astronomer Waddle Dee looks just like any other member of his species, with the only difference being the purple hat with constellation patterns and crystal tip that he wears on his head. Ever since he arrived at Planet Popstar, Astronomer Waddle Dee has read and studied legends from books that the people of the New World left behind. He first had to learn how to read the languages in each books. He then learned about the legend of themeteor, and was shocked when it does fall, creating theFallen-Star Volcano, he realized that it was no fairy tale, and that the meteor has fallen into the world lots of times before, which can bring disaster.

characters.description: Kirby Mass AttackspriteAwadoronName(JA)アワドロン (Awadoron)- MeaningAwadoronIn GamesPoints Given500CategoryRegular enemy Awadoronis anenemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby Mass Attack. Awadoron is an orange clam with purple eyes. It has many similar looks to that of a regular clam.

characters.name: Awasuki
characters.description: Kirby Mass AttackspriteAwasukiName(JA)アワスキィ(Awasukyi)- MeaningAwasukiIn GamesCategoryRegular EnemyAwasukiis anenemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby Mass Attack. Awasuki is a tiny orange fish with shiny eyes similar toKirby's. Its tail fin and dorsal fin are both a reddish color. Awasuki appears exclusively in Stage 10 ofGreen Groundsand Stage 5 ofDedede Resort. It is a passive enemy; it cannot damage Kirby or be defeated. It sleeps holding anair bubble, but when the Kirbys approach it, the fish wakes up and flees. After a brief chase, the enemy darts off-screen. The Kirbys can take Awasuki’s air bubble if they reach it before the foe escapes.

characters.name: Awoofy
characters.description: Kirby and the Forgotten LandartworkAwoofyName(JA)ガルルフィ (Garurufi)- MeaningGrowlfyIn GamesCopy AbilityNoneCategoryRegular Enemy Awoofy(plural:Awoofies) is anenemyin theKirbyseries, debuting inKirby and the Forgotten Land. It gives noCopy Abilitywheninhaled. Awoofy has notably canine-like features. It's covered in orange fur with a beige underbelly and snout. It has pointy ears, a slightly bushy tail, yellow hind paws, and a shiny, black nose. Its fur has red tips on its ears, tail, and front paws. Additionally, it has a red stripe on its forehead. It has eyes similar to those ofKirby's, albeit brown instead of blue.
